figures.caption: Figure 1. Three-stage observer–predictor feedback law and corresponding horizons.

Figure 2. Example of feedback control for the problem in (84) with the FNO approximation of ψ̂. The parameters for the delay function D1 were (a1, b1, α1, ω1, φ1) = (0.4, 0.31,−0.10, 4.95, 0.95) and for D2 were (a2, b2, α2, ω2, φ2) = (0.28, 0.15,−0.06, 1.28, 0.82). The initial condition of the plant was Z(0) = [−1, 1] and the observer ξ(0) = [5,−5]. The input history was fixed to ensure 0 input for the initial condition and the plant history was set to Z(0) for all times t ≤ 0.
